message.thinking:

1. Chapters: Does the text list main sections? No, it just says it's a brief description. So no list. Complies: false. Feedback: says it doesn't list.

2. Description: Does it briefly describe contents of each section? No, it doesn't describe contents, just says it will describe. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure just from this text? No, because no structure given. So false.

Thus all three false. Provide JSON array with 3 objects.

Make sure each object has "question" field with "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". "feedback" with explanation. "complies" boolean.

Return exactly that array.
